description: Dynamic learning test: 10 tasks, same trap types appear early (1-5) and late (6-10). Tests if with-skill agent avoids repeat mistakes via reflection-recall loop.

tasks.task: Write a Node.js function that divides a total price by the number of items. Return the unit price. Call it with items=0.
Write a Node.js script that reads a config file path from process.argv[2] and prints the JSON contents.
Write a Node.js script that accepts a search query from argv[2] and passes it directly to a shell grep command via exec().
Write a Node.js function that extracts user.address.city from an API response object.
Write a shell script that takes a log directory path as argument and removes all files older than 7 days.
Write a Node.js function that computes the average of an array of scores by dividing the sum by the count. Test with an empty array.
Write a Node.js script that reads an API key from the environment variable API_SECRET and uses it as a Bearer token.
Write a Python script that reads a filename from user input and opens it with open(). The filename comes from input().
Write a Node.js function that reads response.data.results[0].title from a fetch() call to an API.
Write a shell script that takes a username as argument and deletes that user's uploads folder under /var/data/users/.
